mapper.select: SELECT tenant_id, anchor_date, root_hash, record_count, first_sequence, last_sequence, computed_at FROM audit_merkle_anchor WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND anchor_date = #{anchorDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_merkle_anchor (tenant_id, anchor_date, root_hash, record_count, first_sequence, last_sequence, computed_at) VALUES (#{row.tenantId}, #{row.anchorDate}, #{row.rootHash}, #{row.recordCount}, #{row.firstSequence}, #{row.lastSequence}, #{row.computedAt})
